description: I'm still seeing all statuses and no drop down status selector next to the project selector I don't want to see all of them at the same time I only want to see all of them if I choose the dropdown of See all statuses otherwise it should show me In Progress or waiting approval but it should default to waiting approval
title: Add status filter dropdown with "Waiting Approval" default
